title: US bombs Iranian military sites and Kuwait is hit by drone and missile fire - AP News
summary: The United States has launched airstrikes against Iranian military installations, escalating tensions in the region. Concurrently, Kuwait reported being targeted by drone and missile attacks, further highlighting the volatile security situation in the Middle East.

title: The Energy Crisis Will Long Outlast the Iran War - Foreign Policy
summary: Experts predict that the global energy crisis will persist far beyond the immediate cessation of hostilities in the ongoing Iran war. This prolonged instability is expected to have lasting repercussions on international energy markets and supply chains.

title: The great Indo-Pacific hedge - deeper defence ties as US doubts grow and China ascends - Reuters
summary: Nations in the Indo-Pacific are forging stronger defense alliances amidst growing uncertainties about American commitment and China's increasing regional influence. This strategic hedging aims to bolster security and maintain a balance of power in a rapidly evolving geopolitical landscape.

title: Pentagon chief sounds ‘alarm’ over China’s buildup, urges allies to boost defense spend - Rappler
summary: The Pentagon's top official has expressed serious concern regarding China's accelerating military expansion, calling for allied nations to significantly increase their defense expenditures. This urgent appeal underscores fears about regional stability and the shifting global power dynamics.

title: The Quad’s new agenda: ports, cables and minerals - Asia Times
summary: The Quad alliance is reportedly expanding its strategic focus to include critical infrastructure projects such as ports, undersea cables, and mineral supply chains. This new agenda aims to enhance economic resilience and counter geopolitical influence in the Indo-Pacific region.

title: How the ‘double scar’ of past inflation woes and geopolitical shocks amid the Iran war is hitting consumers - CNBC
summary: Consumers are currently facing significant economic strain due to the combined impact of lingering inflation from previous periods and the fresh geopolitical shocks stemming from the Iran war. This dual pressure is leading to increased financial hardship and uncertainty for households globally.

title: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media - BBC
summary: The Indian government has unveiled new regulations aimed at overseeing content shared on social media platforms, specifically targeting news and political discourse. These proposed rules could significantly impact how information is disseminated and discussed online within the country.

title: MeitY secretary says every social media user posting on current affairs can come under I&B oversight - ThePrint
